InlineExamplesSource.description: Inline examples provided directly in the request body.

Examples.description: Examples to add. Each example is a free-form JSON document validated against the declared schemaType.

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption

S3Source.description: S3 location of a JSONL file containing dataset examples.

S3Uri.description: S3 URI of the JSONL file (e.g. s3://my-bucket/path/to/examples.jsonl).
S3Uri.markdownDescription:
S3 URI of the JSONL file (e.g. s3://my-bucket/path/to/examples.jsonl).

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^s3://[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.\-]{1,61}[a-z0-9]/.{1,1024}$  
Update requires: No interruption

S3Source.markdownDescription:
S3 location of a JSONL file containing dataset examples.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

DataSourceType.description: Source of initial examples. Provide either inline examples or an S3 URI pointing to a JSONL file.
DataSourceType.markdownDescription:
Source of initial examples. Provide either inline examples or an S3 URI pointing to a JSONL file.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

DatasetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.
DatasetArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-[a-z]+)*:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:dataset/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,110}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DatasetId.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.
DatasetId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,110}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DatasetName.description: Human-readable name for the dataset. Unique within the account (case-insensitive). Immutable after creation.
DatasetName.markdownDescription:
Human-readable name for the dataset. Unique within the account (case-insensitive). Immutable after creation.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{0,47}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
A description of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 200  
Update requires: No interruption

SchemaType.description: Versioned schema type governing the structure of examples. Immutable after creation.
SchemaType.markdownDescription:
Versioned schema type governing the structure of examples. Immutable after creation.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AGENTCORE_EVALUATION_PREDEFINED_V1 | AGENTCORE_EVALUATION_SIMULATED_V1  
Update requires: Replacement

KmsKeyArn.description: Optional AWS KMS key ARN for SSE-KMS on service S3 writes.
KmsKeyArn.markdownDescription:
Optional AWS KMS key ARN for SSE-KMS on service S3 writes.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(|-cn|-us-gov):kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.description: The current status of the dataset.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | UPDATING | DELETING | ACTIVE | CREATE_FAILED | UPDATE_FAILED | DELETE_FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
